items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, 1 critical
items.summary: A critical vulnerability was found in one of Amasty's Magento extensions, which can lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated remote code execution in JTL Shop (Template Injection)
items.summary: A critical template injection flaw in JTL Shop allows anonymous attackers to steal database credentials and run code on the server.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (PHP Object Injection)
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability (Incorrect Authorization)
items.summary: An Incorrect Authorization vulnerability allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to the affected application.

items.title: Adobe Commerce DoS Vulnerability (Uncontrolled Resource Consumption)
items.summary: An Uncontrolled Resource Consumption vulnerability allows remote, unauthenticated attackers to exhaust system resources and trigger an application denial-of-service condition.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files (polyglot code disguised as image) to any store, potentially leading to remote code execution or account takeover.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: An Incorrect Authorization vulnerability allows attackers to execute code remotely, potentially leading to full system takeover.

items.title: Improper Access Control in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: An Improper Access Control vulnerability allows attackers to bypass security filters and access restricted information, leading to data leaks.

items.title: Stored XSS in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability allows malicious scripts to escalate user privileges, potentially leading to admin hijacking.

items.title: Path Traversal in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A Path Traversal vulnerability allows for unauthorized reading of sensitive server files.

items.title: SessionReaper: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability (Improper Input Validation)
items.summary: This critical improper input validation vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote attackers to achieve session takeover against affected storefronts, with active exploitation reported in the wild.
